narrative:
Townsend (precinct in Sandusky County) has 1,019 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
